title: Open the app and verify the list of categories
test_steps: Open the 'Photo Notes Maker' app. | Verify that the screen displays a list of categories such as 'Anniversary', 'Attitude Shayari', 'Bewafa Shayari', etc.
expected_result: The list of categories is displayed correctly.

title: Click on a category to navigate to its details
test_steps: Open the 'Photo Notes Maker' app. | Click on a category from the list, e.g., 'Anniversary'. | Verify that the app navigates to the details page for the selected category.
expected_result: The app navigates to the details page for the selected category.

title: Verify that the refresh icon works
test_steps: Open the 'Photo Notes Maker' app. | Click on the refresh icon in the header. | Verify that the list of categories is refreshed.
expected_result: The list of categories is refreshed.

title: Check for navigation to the advertisement
test_steps: Open the 'Photo Notes Maker' app. | Scroll down to the bottom of the screen. | Click on the 'Visit Site' button in the advertisement. | Verify that the app navigates to the website for 'The Furniture Gallery'.
expected_result: The app navigates to the website for 'The Furniture Gallery'.

title: Verify data persistence after app closure
test_steps: Open the 'Photo Notes Maker' app. | Close the app. | Reopen the app. | Verify that the list of categories is still displayed.
expected_result: The list of categories is still displayed.

title: Check for accessibility/usability
test_steps: Open the 'Photo Notes Maker' app. | Perform a screen reader test on the app. | Verify that all elements are accessible and usable.
expected_result: All elements are accessible and usable.
